<!-- Thanks for the PR. Please skim CONTRIBUTING.md if you haven't already. -->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. The "why" matters more than the "what". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only

## Screenshots / recordings (UI changes only)

<!-- Drag a before/after image or short screen recording here. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Manual steps, new tests, both. -->

- [ ] `xcodegen generate` ran clean
- [ ] Project builds with no new warnings
- [ ] `xcodebuild test` passes
- [ ] Manually exercised the feature on Apple Silicon
- [ ] For UI changes: tested at default and at largest accessibility text size

## Risk / blast radius

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to: TCC permissions, signing, paste injection, audio capture, hotkey conflicts. -->

## Linked issues

Closes #
